name: Tufted Canvas Storage Bin - Cloud Island™ Pink L
description: From toys to blankets to bath items and more, this Tufted Canvas Storage Bin from cloud island™ will help keep your kid's items organized. This cream storage bin features a textured look with an arc shaped green, yellow and pink tufting at the bottom to add a colorful look. The pink built-in handles add contrasting flair while making it easier to move around as needed. Easy to pair with any decor style, this round storage bin helps maintain a clean space.
